Time is friend - reversion usually happens quickly
Gamma acceleration - options become more sensitive as they move ITM.

comment.body:
i need high delta for quick trades, and high gamma and low theta. 
thats the ITM. more expensive, but better sharpe.
i don't care if delta moves fast, i want my premium to move fast.

the thing is that OTM has higher convexity due to gamma.
but...
